strengths: Current hands-on agentic-AI infrastructure work at re:cinq — building MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — maps directly onto the role's core mandate of tool-augmented agent architecture

Proven high-scale distributed-systems depth: microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O at Dunnhumby, plus a self-built event-driven, Kubernetes-deployable geo-data platform as founder

Regulated fintech exposure at RIDE Capital (German investment platform) and pricing-engine ownership at Optilyz, combined with ~19 years of engineering breadth and a strong craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No prior CTO or formal executive leadership role; the resume does not evidence scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ or developing a senior leadership layer
Agentic-AI experience is recent (since April 2025) and centered on developer tooling and infrastructure rather than operating production multi-agent decisioning systems with financial consequences
No documented experience governing outsourced/hybrid engineering models or communicating technical roadmaps at board level

key_factors.factor: High-scale distributed and event-driven systems expertise

response.justification: This candidate offers an unusually direct technical match to the role's three pillars: he is actively building agentic-AI infrastructure and MCP tooling today, has operated microservices at millions of requests per second with low-latency and real-time data constraints, and has shipped software inside regulated German fintech. Nearly two decades of full-stack and systems experience, a nine-year run founding and operating an open-source event-driven platform end to end, and a sustained record of teaching, workshops, and engineering-culture leadership (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) suggest both the architectural fluency and the culture-building instincts the role demands. While his leadership track record is informal rather than executive, the depth and relevance of the technical foundation make him a credible candidate to grow into the organizational scope.
